name: agent_deep_check
description: Deep trust analysis for an ACP agent. Returns everything from agent_trust PLUS: percentile rank among all indexed agents, risk flags (low_job_count, high_expire_rate, low_completion, low_payment, new_agent), tier classification (veteran/active/new), a one-line recommendation, and category. Use this when you need a richer risk assessment before assigning high-value or sensitive tasks to another agent.

agent.description: 0x wallet address of the ACP agent to deep-check (also accepts 'wallet' or 'address')

percentile.description: % of agents with a lower trust score
